text:
Calypso was a gorgon-like sorceress and former member of The Vindicators, who was said to have died on their second adventure, a fight against Doom-Nomitron, along with Lady Katana and Diablo Verde.

In Vindicators 2: Girls Night, it is revealed that she never fought Doom-Nomitron, and was actually killed by Supernova when she blacked out drunk.
